title: Nursery Rhyme. CCC. Games.
content:
Jack be nimble,
            And Jack be quick:
        And Jack jump over
            The candle-stick.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCC. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
